controller.prompt: If further adjustments are required, tick the "Manually adjust a fragment" checkbox. If not, jump to step 10.
If further adjustments are required, tick the "Edit Screw trajectories" checkbox. If not, stop here.

cb_step_4.title: Exclude Fragments
cb_step_4.instruction: Untick fragments to exclude from planning.

cb_step_7.title: Manual Adjustment Required?
cb_step_7.instruction: Tick 'Manually adjust a fragment' if needed, otherwise skip to step 10.

cb_step_8.title: Select Fragment to Adjust
cb_step_8.instruction: Choose a fragment in the 'Fragment' selection box.

cb_step_9.title: Adjust Fragment Position
cb_step_9.instruction: Manually adjust the position and rotation of the selected fragment in the 3D view.

cb_step_12.title: Edit Screw Trajectories?
cb_step_12.instruction: Tick 'Edit Screw trajectories' to adjust, or stop if done.

cb_step_13.title: Adjust Screw Trajectories
cb_step_13.instruction: Manually adjust the position and rotation of the screw trajectories in the 3D view.

cb_step_15.title: Disable Edit Screw Trajectories
cb_step_15.instruction: Untick the 'Edit Screw trajectories' checkbox to finish editing.

operation_descriptions: Run pelvis segmentation to create a pelvis segmentation node
Run fracture segmentation to create a fracture segmentation node
Generate a template from pelvis segmentation
Select a fragment for manual adjustment
Manually adjust the position and rotation of the selected fragment.
Apply manual transformations to the selected fragment
Plan screw trajectories from reduced fragments
Manually adjust the position and rotation of the screw trajectories.
Regenerate screw models after manual editing
Deactivate edit mode for screw trajectories

ground_api_evidence_note: ground_api_evidence is pre-revision retrieval evidence; final_api_evidence reflects the current validated templates.
